title: stats files are missing when using plan replayer capture
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, age INTEGER, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO users(id, name, age) VALUES(1, 'Alice', 30);
INSERT INTO users(id, name, age) VALUES(2, 'Bob', NULL);
SELECT * FROM users WHERE age IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE age > (SELECT AVG(age) FROM users);
key_bug_features: plan replayer capture does not include stats files
